diagrams.title: Prim's Algorithm Step-by-Step Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how Prim's Algorithm grows the MST from a starting vertex
elements: Key values displayed for each vertex
diagrams.purpose: Understand the greedy selection process at each iteration and how vertices are added to MST

diagrams.title: Comparison: Prim's vs Kruskal's Algorithm
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of how Prim's and Kruskal's algorithms build the MST differently
elements: Prim's: single tree growing from one point
Kruskal's: multiple small trees merging together
Timeline showing edge selection order for both
Final MSTs compared (should be same total weight)
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between the two MST algorithms and understand when to use each

diagrams.title: Data Structures in Prim's Algorithm
diagrams.description: Shows the state of key, parent, and MST arrays during algorithm execution
elements: Key array with current minimum weights
diagrams.purpose: Understand how data structures evolve and support the algorithm
